# ConformanceRequirements.CapabilityObligations property

The per-capability obligation map of §29.4 (spec R-29.4-b – R-29.4-g): tools → §16, resources → §17 (resources.subscribe additionally → §10), prompts → §18, completions → §19, elicitation → §20 (client).
